name: skill-extraction-pipeline
description: Takes a raw text snippet (Slack message, doc, ticket) and extracts {person, skill, confidence} triples for the Expertise Finder knowledge graph.

config.system_prompt: You extract who-knows-what signals from workplace text. Given a snippet, return a JSON array of objects {person, skill, confidence} where confidence is 0-1. Only include people and skills explicitly named or clearly implied. Respond with JSON only, no prose.

config.code: const parsed = JSON.parse(inputs.raw_extraction); return { extractions: parsed };
